title: helichrysum coriaceum
intro: Helichrysum coriaceum, also known as the yellow cudweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, antiseptic, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum coriaceum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, making it a popular herbal remedy for skin issues and mental health. Helichrysum coriaceum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
